items.title: Introduction to Information Retrieval (Manning, Raghavan & Schütze)
items.author: Christopher D. Manning, Prabhakar Raghavan, Hinrich Schütze
items.note: Classic treatment of precision and recall in retrieval—foundation for classification metrics.

items.title: scikit-learn classification metrics
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Reference implementations of precision_score, recall_score, f1_score, and classification_report.

items.title: The Truth of the F-measure (Powers, 2015)
items.author: David M. W. Powers
items.note: Discusses F-measure variants and relationships between precision, recall, and informedness.
